PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('application')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('testapp')
      PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
      PsiErrorElement:'(', '=>', CONSUMES, PRODUCES or '[' expected, got 'gotcha'
        <empty list>
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('gotcha')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Testapp')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''myapp'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('var')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''hi there'')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('application')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('otherapp')
      PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
      PsiErrorElement:'(', '=>', CONSUMES, PRODUCES or '[' expected, got 'gotcha'
        <empty list>
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('gotcha')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiElement(})('}')
